name: Mobile Lads Corp.
summary: Mobile Lads Corp., a development stage company, focuses on providing marketing products and services using short message service (SMS) technology primarily to advertising, retail, and entertainment businesses. The company's SMS technology involves sending marketing offers through cell phones that target specific audiences at the last minute. It intends to offer mobile optimized Websites that are designed for smartphones, not a desktop computer; SMS text message marketing; and quick response codes. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Oakville, Canada.
